fields.LISTEN_1: "We spend hours figuring out what actually broke."
fields.LISTEN_2: "Our monitoring tools all show different things."
fields.LISTEN_3: "It takes too long to find the root cause."
fields.SAY_1: "Elastic correlates logs, metrics, and traces so teams see the full picture."
fields.SAY_2: "Most teams use Elastic to shorten incident response and restore services faster."
fields.ASK_1: "How long does it usually take your team to isolate the root cause?"
fields.NEXT_STEP: Review a recent incident together and map how Elastic would diagnose it.

fields.LISTEN_1: "Users cannot find what they need in our application."
fields.LISTEN_3: "We built search ourselves and it keeps breaking."
fields.SAY_1: "Elasticsearch is designed to deliver fast, relevant search at massive scale."
fields.SAY_2: "Teams adopt Elastic when search becomes critical to the user experience."
fields.ASK_1: "What happens to your business when users cannot find information quickly?"
fields.NEXT_STEP: Review the current search architecture and identify relevance improvement opportunities.

fields.LISTEN_1: "Our analysts spend most of their time chasing alerts."
fields.LISTEN_3: "Our SIEM is expensive and hard to operate."
fields.SAY_1: "Elastic unifies security telemetry so investigations happen in one platform."
fields.SAY_2: "Security teams use Elastic to detect threats earlier and investigate faster."
fields.ASK_1: "How much time does your SOC spend investigating false positives?"
fields.NEXT_STEP: Walk through a recent investigation and show how Elastic would streamline it.

fields.LISTEN_1: "We want to use AI but integrating models is complicated."
fields.LISTEN_2: "AI projects are hard to operationalize in production."
fields.LISTEN_3: "Our teams are experimenting but nothing is deployed yet."
fields.SAY_1: "Elastic lets teams run AI inference directly inside their existing workflows."
fields.SAY_2: "Most teams use Elastic to operationalize AI without new infrastructure."
fields.ASK_1: "Where would AI create the most value in your existing workflows?"
fields.NEXT_STEP: Identify one production workflow where AI inference could improve outcomes.

fields.LISTEN_1: "We have too many tools managing operational data."
fields.LISTEN_2: "Different teams use different platforms for the same data."
fields.LISTEN_3: "Our data architecture has become too complex."
fields.SAY_1: "Elastic consolidates search, observability, and security on one data platform."
fields.SAY_2: "Many organizations adopt Elastic to simplify operational data architecture."
fields.ASK_1: "How many different systems manage operational data today?"
fields.NEXT_STEP: Map the current tooling landscape and identify consolidation opportunities.
